prompt: Convert the font of top-right corner title of the poster (first image). English words should be in the font of the second image, and Chinese words should be in the font of the third image.
remarks: 1.png source: hkhouse; 2.png source: forbes; 3.png source: Google Fonts
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Modify the textual graphics in the top-right corner title block, which contains 'Vancouver Hong Kong Fair' and '香港人市集'. For the English words 'Vancouver Hong Kong Fair', adopt the font style demonstrated in image 2. For the Chinese words '香港人市集', apply the font style from image 3.
objects: "Vancouver Hong Kong Fair" text with font style from Image 2
"香港人市集" text with font style from Image 3
